title: Announcements
content:
Announcements

Graduate School

Announcements

PhD Proficiency Exam Application

07
						April

2026

Dear Students,

Applications for the May 2026 PhD Qualifying Examination have started. The examinations will be held in person.

Students who wish to take the qualifying exam must have successfully completed all their courses and submitted all required documents. It is important that students have their files checked by the Student Affairs Office before applying.

Applications must be submitted by

at the latest, with a petition addressed to the Graduate School Directorate. Petitions must be delivered to the Institute Secretariat.

Contact Information:

E-mail:

enstitusekreterligi@okan.edu.tr

Phone: +90 212 212 65 26 (1318 / 1325)

Address: Avni Dilligil Street No: 18, 34394 Mecidiyeköy / Istanbul

For your information.
